revision.comment: be safe and limit these to minerva for time being (but I think we can consolidate these with MediaWiki:Common.css)
Izno moved page [[Template:Navbar/styles.css]] to [[Module:Navbar/styles.css]] without leaving a redirect: navbar is implemented in module space
and move that out of more specific rule

Protected "[[Module:Navbar/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: match to parent ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
navbar-mini is never a span, and span doesn't have all the stuff that needs resetting
navbar styles that were moved to parent templates
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Navbar/styles.css]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with
Fixes visibility of navbar edit links in dark mode.
-@media screen, +@media print from [[MediaWiki:Print.css]] per [[MediaWiki talk:Common.css/to do#Turn mobile.css/js totally off]]
Fixes [[phab:T369874]]. Please see talk page and do not revert without discussion (and good reason). See also [[meta:User:Jon_(WMF)/Edit_for_dark_mode_support]]
as before, remove @media screen, as this template is display: none in print
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
1 revision imported: trying to fix the navbars
1 revision imported: I hope this manages to go through
1 revision imported: reimporting to fix errors
1 revision imported: importing these ahead in time so that it does not mess up
1 revision imported: attempting to fix the nihongo
1 revision imported: chat is this real
1 revision imported: chat is this real
1 revision imported: importing blank templates I made to fill out template blank links
1 revision imported: importing everything for the citation needed templates
1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up
1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23043689808|manual triggered pipeline]]
